emails.subject: Termination on EOL deal
emails.body: Bob, can you send me a copy of the EnronOnline confirm so I can prepare this. Thanks! Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 04/11/2000 03:31 PM From: Jennifer deBoisblanc Denny 04/11/2000 02:53 PM
